alert.title: user-service unresponsive — cascading failures detected
alert.message: user-service has stopped responding after gradual degradation. order-service and payment-service reporting failures. Customer-facing error rate at 60%.

logs: 2024-03-28 18:00:00 [INFO] Deploy v3.1.0 started by ci-pipeline (commit: e4f5g6h)

root_cause.description: Deploy v3.1.0 to user-service introduced an unbounded HashMap in UserSessionCache.refreshAll() that grew continuously until the process was killed by OOM, cascading failures to all dependent services
